programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger.

programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger. S2Ep5

programme.title: My Stepfather's Secret
programme.desc: (2019) Thriller with Vanessa Marcil. A college student returns home to discover her mother has a new fiancé. But as she finds out more about him, should it be alarm bells rather than wedding bells?

programme.title: Ex-Wife Killer
programme.desc: A woman vouches for her ex-husband after he seemingly kills his new wife in self-defence but after he is let off the hook, she discovers his elaborate ploy. Starring Marguerite Moreau (2017)

programme.title: Killer Ending
programme.desc: (2018) Drama thriller starring Chelsea Hobbs. Crime fiction becomes a horrifying reality when a novelist's daughter is abducted in a copycat scenario taken straight from her latest book.

programme.title: A Lover Betrayed
programme.desc: (2017) Thriller with Jamie Luner. Tess is finally ready to live again after her son's death years before. But a brief romance with a handsome soldier is about to twist from attraction into obsession..

programme.title: Amber Alert
programme.desc: A troubled young man hijacks a bus load of school children. Meanwhile Detective Amber Cross (Alaina Huffman), battling with her own demons and issues, is called in to negotiate

programme.title: Fatal Flatline
programme.desc: (2020) Thriller starring Julie McNiven. A grieving couple donates their dead daughter's organs. But the recipient of her heart exhibits a disturbing and sinister obsession.

programme.title: Deadliest Switch
programme.desc: (2020) Thriller starring Lindsay Hartley. Two families are thrown into crisis when they discover their daughters were switched at birth - but nothing will stop one mother keeping what's hers...

programme.title: Killing Salazar
programme.desc: Six U.S. agents have to protect a key witness in a major drug case from being murdered by the drug dealers he is going to testify against. Starring Luke Goss and Steven Seagal (2016).

programme.title: Black Water
programme.desc: When he is imprisoned aboard a CIA submarine under mysterious circumstances, a deep cover operative joins forces with another prisoner to break free. Stars Jean-Claude Van Damme, Dolph Lundgren (2018)

programme.title: The Exception
programme.desc: (2016) War drama with Jai Courtney, Lily James and Christopher Plummer. A German soldier falls for a Jewish maid while investigating the exiled Kaiser. Will he honour his country or follow his heart?

programme.title: Four Fast Guns
programme.desc: (1960) Western with James Craig. A former gunslinger tries to restore order to a lawless town, but is foiled by the efforts of an evil saloon owner whose infirmity grants him immunity from violence.

programme.title: Kentucky Rifle
programme.desc: (1955) Suspenseful western with Chill Wills, Lance Fuller and Cathy Downs. When a gun-filled wagon breaks down in enemy territory, will its occupants surrender their cargo or fight for their lives?

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: A group of women head to the airport bar ahead of their trip to Las Vegas for a bachelorette party, and airline staff are excited in anticipation for the company's Southwest Spirit party. S1Ep8

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, a swarm of dangerous bees have set up a hive at Gate 13, and a customer supervisor is excited to learn that a royal passenger will be travelling through LAX. S1Ep9

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: Flight attendant Heather Hale is shocked when her boyfriend asks her an important question, and a student attempts to get to New York to see his girlfriend. S1Ep10

programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger.

programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger. S2Ep7
